chapter_title.en: Chapter on Rare Cases of Bequests

text: 5565 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ اَلْحَكَمِ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُدَبِّرُ مَمْلُوكَهُ أَ لَهُ أَنْ يَرْجِعَ فِيهِ فَقَالَ "نَعَمْ هُوَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلْوَصِيَّةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5565 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hisham ibn Al-Hakam, who said:
I asked Imam (as) about a man who designates his slave for emancipation after his death (mudabbar). Can he revoke this decision?
Imam (as) said: "Yes, it is like a will."
